# Alaska Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Alaska bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Alaska exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
alaskabankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Alaska Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Alaska -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Alaska -- Payment Plans, Timeline: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
- Alaska Bankruptcy Exemptions -- What You Can Keep: https://alaskabankruptcy.org/exemptions.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
